title: Add automation operations runbook
goal: Add an operations runbook and proof matrix for installing, disabling, inspecting and auditing the Bureau runtime automation baseline.

metadata.safety_boundary: documentation, proof matrix and audit commands only

acceptance.assertion: Runbook documents install, enable, disable, status and journal inspection for each automation unit.
Proof matrix lists each automation loop, inputs, outputs, write paths, authority limits and validation commands.
Rollback path restores manual-only Bureau operation without deleting state-root evidence.
